channel.title: morningNewsSection1
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from morningNewsSection1, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: AAA Evaluates EV Performance in Varying Temperatures
item.description: AAA research assesses the impact of winter and summer temperatures on electric vehicle range.

item.title: DHS Shutdown Resolved; May Day Protests Expected
item.description: The Department of Homeland Security shutdown has ended. May Day protests are planned nationwide.

item.title: Quiz: What did the Trump administration focus on this week?
item.description: This week's quiz covers federal government actions including indictments, paint jobs and commemorative items.

item.title: AI Replaces Tech Worker in China, Legal Dispute Follows
item.description: A Hangzhou tech employee's termination following AI system implementation is under legal review by an appeals court.
